title: aster stelliger
intro: Aster stelliger, also known as starry aster or stellate aster, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Aster stelliger include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
